items.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
items.content: <article>Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.</article>

items.title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
items.content: <article>See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.</article>

items.title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
items.content: <article>See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.</article>

items.title: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
items.content: <article>How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.</article>

items.title: Getting started with ChatGPT
items.content: <article>Learn how to use ChatGPT, start your first conversation, and discover simple ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI.</article>

items.title: GPT-5.6 is now the preferred model in Microsoft 365 Copilot
items.content: <article>Learn how GPT-5.6 powers Microsoft 365 Copilot with stronger AI capabilities across Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Chat, and Cowork for faster, higher-quality work.</article>

items.title: ChatGPT is now a partner for your most ambitious work
items.content: <article>ChatGPT Work is an agent that can take action across your apps and files, stay with a project for hours if needed, and turn a goal into finished work.</article>

items.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.content: <article>Details about the OpenAI Bio Bounty program</article>

items.title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
items.content: <article>More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.</article>

items.title: Our approach to government and national security partnerships
items.content: <article>Learn how OpenAI approaches government and national security partnerships, with principles for responsible AI use, democratic accountability, and public safety.</article>

items.title: Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
items.content: <article>A new analysis from OpenAI reveals issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in evaluating AI models.</article>

items.title: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
items.content: <article>OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.</article>

items.title: Introducing GPT-Live
items.content: <article>A new generation of voice models for natural human-AI interaction, now powering ChatGPT Voice.</article>

items.title: Australian Payments Plus moves faster with ChatGPT and Codex
items.content: <article>See how Australian Payments Plus uses ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to move faster through payments complexity. AP+ saves time, improves quality, and keeps human judgment central.</article>

items.title: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
items.content: <article>MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.</article>

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
items.content: <article>New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.</article>

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.content: <article>OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.</article>

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.content: <article>Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.</article>

items.title: Inside Genebench-Pro
Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
items.content: <article>A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.</article>

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.content: <article>HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.</article>

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.content: <article>OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.</article>

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.content: <article>A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.</article>

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.content: <article>OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.</article>

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.content: <article>GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.</article>

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.content: <article>OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.</article>

items.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
items.content: <article>Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.</article>

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
items.content: <article>OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.</article>

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.content: <article>OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.</article>

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
items.content: <article>Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.</article>

items.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
items.content: <article>Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.</article>

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
items.content: <article>OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.</article>

items.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
items.content: <article>Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.</article>

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.content: <article>Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.</article>

items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.content: <article>OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.</article>

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.content: <article>Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.</article>

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.content: <article>OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.</article>
